# mtncloud_user_group (Resource)

Manages an MTN Cloud user group (a set of users with a shared Linux login and sudo policy).

## Example Usage

```terraform
# A user group with a shared Linux login and sudo policy.
resource "mtncloud_user_group" "platform" {
  name         = "platform"
  description  = "Platform engineers"
  sudo_access  = true
  server_group = "platform"
  user_ids     = [mtncloud_user.jdoe.id]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Name of the user group.

### Optional

- `description` (String) Description of the user group.
- `server_group` (String) Linux server group name applied to members.
- `sudo_access` (Boolean) Whether members get sudo access on provisioned instances.
- `user_ids` (List of Number) IDs of the users that belong to the group.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Numeric identifier of the user group.
